reviews.comment:
Mala experiencia nos cargaron gasoil en vez de nafta tuvimos que quedarnos 2 días más hasta conseguir un mecanico

(Translated by Google)
Bad experience, they charged us diesel instead of gasoline, we had to stay 2 more days until we got a mechanic.

reviews.comment:
De Quilino a Catamarca es lo unico q hay y tenes shop, baños limpios y algo de sombra 😆

(Translated by Google)
From Quilino to Catamarca is the only option, and it has a shop, clean bathrooms, and some shade 😆
